instruction: Configure VS Code to edit GIMP script-fu scripts effectively by installing lisp extension. Test by writing code to resize the image "character.png" to 128 * 128 as "resized.png".

evaluator.eval: is_extension_installed(get_command_output(env, command="code --list-extensions | grep mattn.lisp", shell=False), rules={'type': 'contain', 'expected': 'mattn.lisp'}) and check_image_size(get_vm_file(env, path='/home/user/Desktop/resized.png'), rules={'height': 128, 'width': 128})
